programme.desc: Plexaderm helps reduce Under Eye Bags, Dark Circles, and Wrinkles in just 10 minutes!

programme.title: Red Tails
programme.desc: During World War II, the Civil Aeronautics Authority selects 13 black cadets to become part of an experimental program at the Tuskegee Institute in Alabama. The program aims at training colored personnel to become fighter pilots for the Army. However, discrimination, lack of institutional support and the racist belief that these men lacked the intelligence and aptitude for the job dog their every step. Despite this, the Tuskegee Airmen, as they become known, more than prove their worth.

programme.title: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: This sweeping drama, based on real historical events, follows American boyhood friends Rafe McCawley (Ben Affleck) and Danny Walker (Josh Hartnett) as they enter World War II as pilots. Rafe is so eager to take part in the war that he departs to fight in Europe alongside England's Royal Air Force. On the home front, his girlfriend, Evelyn (Kate Beckinsale), finds comfort in the arms of Danny. The three of them reunite in Hawaii just before the Japanese attack on Pearl Harbor.

programme.title: Captain America: The First Avenger
programme.desc: It is 1941 and the world is in the throes of war. Steve Rogers (Chris Evans) wants to do his part and join America's armed forces, but the military rejects him because of his small stature. Finally, Steve gets his chance when he is accepted into an experimental program that turns him into a supersoldier called Captain America. Joining forces with Bucky Barnes (Sebastian Stan) and Peggy Carter (Hayley Atwell), Captain America leads the fight against the Nazi-backed HYDRA organization.

programme.title: Captain Marvel
programme.desc: Captain Marvel is an extraterrestrial Kree warrior who finds herself caught in the middle of an intergalactic battle between her people and the Skrulls. Living on Earth in 1995, she keeps having recurring memories of another life as U.S. Air Force pilot Carol Danvers. With help from Nick Fury, Captain Marvel tries to uncover the secrets of her past while harnessing her special superpowers to end the war with the evil Skrulls.

programme.title: Captain America: The Winter Soldier
programme.desc: After the cataclysmic events in New York with his fellow Avengers, Steve Rogers, aka Captain America (Chris Evans), lives in the nation's capital as he tries to adjust to modern times. An attack on an S.H.I.E.L.D. colleague throws Rogers into a web of intrigue that places the whole world at risk. Joining forces with the Black Widow (Scarlett Johansson) and a new ally, the Falcon, Rogers struggles to expose an ever-widening conspiracy, but he and his team soon come up against an unexpected enemy.

programme.title: Speed
programme.desc: Los Angeles police officer Jack (Keanu Reeves) angers retired bomb squad member Howard Payne (Dennis Hopper) by foiling his attempt at taking hostages. In revenge, Payne arms a bus with a bomb that will explode if it drops below 50 miles per hour. With the help of spunky passenger Annie (Sandra Bullock), Jack and his partner Harry (Jeff Daniels) try to save the people on the bus before the bomb goes off, while also trying to figure out how Payne is monitoring them.

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: A man who loves when a plan comes together, Hannibal Smith leads a close-knit team of elite operatives. Framed for a terrible crime, Smith and his men go rogue, using their special talents to clear their names and find the perpetrator. Hot on their trail is Charissa Sosa, who was once involved with a member of Smith's team and has sworn to capture them, no matter what it takes.

programme.title: Bullet Train
programme.desc: Ladybug is an unlucky assassin who's determined to do his job peacefully after one too many gigs has gone off the rails. Fate, however, may have other plans as his latest mission puts him on a collision course with lethal adversaries from around the globe -- all with connected yet conflicting objectives -- on the world's fastest train.

programme.title: High Anxiety
programme.desc: Just after becoming the director of the Psychoneurotic Institute for the Very, Very Nervous, Dr. Richard H. Thorndyke is greeted by a series of mysterious events. When his colleagues -- including the militaristic and mustachioed Nurse Diesel -- become leery of his questions, they accuse him of murder. Thorndyke's own mental health comes into question as he struggles to clear his name in the midst of a crippling bout of a condition known as high anxiety.

programme.title: Squad Car
programme.desc: An accused man (Don Marlowe) helps a policeman (Paul Bryar) investigate an airplane mechanic's death and a counterfeit racket.

programme.title: The Ghost and Mrs. Muir
programme.desc: Defying her conventional in-laws, young widow Lucy Muir (Gene Tierney) leaves London with her young daughter and moves away for a quieter life in a secluded seaside cottage. Lucy discovers the ghost of the deceased former owner, sea captain Daniel Gregg (Rex Harrison), is haunting the house, but gathers the courage to stand up to him, and woman and ghost become friends. Faced with dwindling means of support, Lucy agrees to the Captain's challenge to write his colorful life story.

programme.title: Hell and High Water
programme.desc: Mercenary sub commander, Captain Adam Jones (Richard Widmark), sells his services to noted atomic scientist Professor Montel (Victor Francen) and his daughter, Denise (Bella Darvi). Professor Montel is convinced the Communists are about to launch a nuclear attack on Korea from an island in the Arctic and blame it on the United States. Captain Jones does not care about politics, but the earnest Professor and his supporters win him over to their cause and they try to thwart the Communist's plans.

programme.title: Decision Before Dawn
programme.desc: During World War II, an American intelligence unit led by Col. Devlin (Gary Merrill) is recruiting German prisoners of war to infiltrate enemy lines and gather vital information. Lt. Rennick (Richard Basehart) heads a unit of Germans that includes the mistrustful "Tiger" (Hans Christian Blech) and the wide-eyed "Happy" (Oskar Werner). When word arrives that a German general is about to negotiate the surrender of his corps, Devlin sends Rennick and his volunteers on a dangerous mission.

programme.title: The Day the Earth Stood Still
programme.desc: When a UFO lands in Washington, D.C., bearing a message for Earth's leaders, all of humanity stands still. Klaatu has come on behalf of alien life who have been watching Cold War-era nuclear proliferation on Earth. But it is Klaatu's soft-spoken robot Gort that presents a more immediate threat to onlookers. A single mother and her son teach the world about peace and tolerance in this moral fable, ousting the tanks and soldiers that greet the alien's arrival.

programme.title: Enemy Mine
programme.desc: During a war between humans and the reptilian Drac race, spaceship pilot Willis Davidge ends up stranded on an alien world, along with enemy fighter Jeriba Shigan. While both Willis and his Drac counterpart can breathe on the planet, the environment and its creatures are relatively hostile, forcing the two to work together to survive. As time goes by, Willis and Jeriba become unlikely friends, though their unique relationship faces considerable challenges.

programme.title: Chaos Walking
programme.desc: In the not-too-distant future, Todd Hewitt discovers a mysterious woman who crash-landed on his planet. It's a dystopian world where all the females have disappeared, and all the men are afflicted by a force that puts their thoughts on display. Vowing to protect her, the duo must navigate dangerous terrain as Todd discovers his inner power and unlocks the planet's dark secrets.

After a catastrophic crash on an unknown planet, pilot Mills quickly discovers he's actually stranded on Earth -- 65 million years ago. Now, with only one chance at a rescue, Mills and the only other survivor, Koa, must make their way across an unknown terrain riddled with dangerous prehistoric creatures.

programme.title: Rise of the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Will Rodman, a scientist in San Francisco, is experimenting with a drug that he hopes will cure his father's Alzheimer's disease. After his work is deemed a failure, Will becomes the guardian of Caesar, an infant chimp who was exposed in utero to Will's drug. Caesar displays unusual intelligence, and Will decides to continue his experiments secretly. But as Caesar's intellect and abilities grow, he comes to represent a threat to man's dominion over Earth.

programme.title: Dawn of the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Ten years after simian flu wiped out much of the world's Homo sapiens, genetically enhanced chimpanzee Caesar and his ever-growing band of followers has established a thriving colony just outside San Francisco in Muir Woods. Meanwhile, a small band of human survivors emerges, which forces Caesar -- as leader -- to grapple with the dual challenge of protecting his people and re-establishing a relationship with the remaining human population -- the latter being Caesar's secret wish.

After a catastrophic crash on an unknown planet, pilot Mills quickly discovers he's actually stranded on Earth -- 65 million years ago. Now, with only one chance at a rescue, Mills and the only other survivor, Koa, must make their way across an unknown terrain riddled with dangerous prehistoric creatures.

programme.title: Resident Evil: Welcome to Raccoon City
programme.desc: Welcome to Raccoon City, once the booming home of pharmaceutical giant Umbrella Corp. The company's exodus left the city a wasteland, a dying town with great evil brewing below the surface. When that evil is unleashed, a group of survivors must work together to uncover the truth behind Umbrella and make it through the night.

programme.title: Can-Can
programme.desc: Parisian nightclub owner Simone Pistache (Shirley MacLaine) is known for her performances of the can-can, a provocative dance recently outlawed for being immoral. Though her dancing delights patrons to no end, it also attracts the ire of the self-righteous Judge Philippe Forrestier (Louis Jourdan), who aims to punish her. The judge hatches a plot to photograph Simone in the act and ends up falling for her -- much to the chagrin of her boyfriend, handsome lawyer François Durnais (Frank Sinatra).

programme.title: Wee Willie Winkie
programme.desc: With her widowed mother (June Lang), precocious Priscilla (Shirley Temple) travels to India to live with her grandfather, Col. Williams (C. Aubrey Smith). A stern officer in the British army, the colonel makes it clear that a military garrison isn't any place for a child. Priscilla proves otherwise, befriending tenderhearted Sgt. MacDuff (Victor McLaglen), getting caught up in the plot of a rebel leader (Cesar Romero) and charming everyone in sight.

programme.title: The Lion
programme.desc: Living an idyllic existence on a Kenyan wildlife preserve, Tina (Pamela Franklin) is remarkably at home with the resident animals. In fact, she is so comfortable with the various creatures that her best friend is an adult lion. While Tina isn't too worried by this relationship, her mother, Christine (Capucine), becomes extremely concerned, and requests that her ex-husband -- Tina's father, Robert (William Holden) -- come for a visit to help straighten the girl out.

programme.title: Voyage to the Bottom of the Sea
programme.desc: Harriman Nelson (Walter Pidgeon) is the creator of a revolutionary nuclear submarine. After testing its capabilities in the Arctic Ocean, Nelson and the commanding officer (Robert Sterling) surface the vessel, only to discover the sky ablaze. Learning that the Van Allen radiation belt has caught fire, Nelson conceives a plan that could save the planet from destruction, but the U.N. shoots it down. Nelson is convinced it will work, but an onboard psychiatrist (Joan Fontaine) questions his sanity.

programme.title: Fantastic Voyage
programme.desc: The brilliant scientist Jan Benes develops a way to shrink humans, and other objects, for brief periods of time. Benes, who is working in communist Russia, is transported by the CIA to America, but is attacked en route. In order to save the scientist, who has developed a blood clot in his brain, a team of Americans in a nuclear submarine is shrunk and injected into Benes' body. They have a finite period of time to fix the clot and get out before the miniaturization wears off.

programme.title: Cocoon
programme.desc: Oscar-winning fantasy in which the residents of a Florida rest home get a new lease of life when they stumble across an alien "fountain of youth" in a disused holiday home. Unbeknown to them, aliens have been using the swimming pool in the house to store their cocooned brethren, giving the waters a powerful, rejuvenating quality.

programme.title: Resident Evil: Welcome to Raccoon City
programme.desc: Welcome to Raccoon City, once the booming home of pharmaceutical giant Umbrella Corp. The company's exodus left the city a wasteland, a dying town with great evil brewing below the surface. When that evil is unleashed, a group of survivors must work together to uncover the truth behind Umbrella and make it through the night.

programme.title: Predators
programme.desc: Brought together on a mysterious planet, a mercenary (Adrien Brody) and a group of cold-blooded killers now become the prey. A new breed of aliens pursues the ragtag humans through dense jungle. The group must work together to survive, or become the latest trophies of the fearsome intergalactic hunters.

programme.title: Predator
programme.desc: Dutch, a soldier of fortune, is hired by the U.S. government to secretly rescue a group of politicians trapped in Guatemala. But when Dutch and his team, which includes weapons expert Blain and CIA agent George, land in Central America, something is wrong. After finding a string of dead bodies, the crew discovers they are being hunted by a brutal creature with superhuman strength and the ability to disappear into its surroundings.

programme.title: Predator 2
programme.desc: Los Angeles is enduring a heat wave and a crime wave, so the pressure on police officer Michael Harrigan to solve a strange string of murders is mounting. Harrigan thinks the culprit can be found among the warring gangs and drug cartels, but FBI Special Agent Peter Keyes knows the horrible truth: Their killer is a fearsome extraterrestrial with keen hunting abilities that include superior night vision and the power to make itself invisible.

programme.title: The Predator
programme.desc: From the outer reaches of space to the small-town streets of suburbia, the hunt comes home. The universe's most lethal hunters are stronger, smarter and deadlier than ever before, having genetically upgraded themselves with DNA from other species. When a boy accidentally triggers their return to Earth, only a ragtag crew of ex-soldiers and a disgruntled science teacher can prevent the end of the human race.

programme.title: Monster Hunter
programme.desc: Behind our world, there is another -- a world of dangerous and powerful monsters that rule their domain with deadly ferocity. When Lt. Artemis and her loyal soldiers are transported from our world to the new one, the unflappable lieutenant receives the shock of her life. In a desperate battle for survival against enormous enemies with incredible powers and unstoppable, terrifying attacks, Artemis teams up with a mysterious hunter who has found a way to fight back.

programme.title: The Alligator People
programme.desc: Newly married nurse Joyce Webster (Beverly Garland) doesn't know what to think when her husband, Paul (Richard Crane), disappears during a train ride. She hires private investigators and eventually tracks him to an old bayou plantation, where the owner (Frieda Inescort) insists she's never heard of Paul. Joyce sticks around anyway and soon learns that local doctor Mark Sinclair (George Macready) has been using a life-altering alligator serum on the town's residents, and that Paul is among them.

programme.title: The Earth Dies Screaming
programme.desc: An astronaut (Willard Parker) returns from a test flight to find England overtaken by alien-controlled robots which turn corpses into zombies.

programme.title: The Detective
programme.desc: When a gay man is viciously slain, Detective Joe Leland (Frank Sinatra) is put on the case. Joe eventually tracks down the victim's roommate, who confesses to the crime and is sentenced to death; however, the outcome of the case doesn't sit well with the detective. Norma (Jacqueline Bisset), a distraught widow, visits Joe. She believes her husband's death was no accident, but the cops don't seem to care. Joe begins to investigate, and stumbles on a cover-up related to his previous case.

programme.title: The Quiller Memorandum
programme.desc: After two British Secret Intelligence Service agents are murdered at the hands of a cryptic neo-Nazi group known as Phoenix, the suave agent Quiller is sent to Berlin to investigate. There, he begins an affair with Inge Lindt, a beautiful young teacher. However, their lives are put in danger after Quiller is kidnapped and taken to Phoenix's headquarters, where he meets Oktober, the mysterious leader of the group.

programme.title: The Kremlin Letter
programme.desc: When an unauthorized letter is sent to Moscow alleging the U.S. government's willingness to help Russia attack China, former naval officer Charles Rone and his team are sent to retrieve it. They go undercover, successfully reaching out to Erika Kosnov, the wife of a former agent, now married to the head of Russia's secret police. Their plans are interrupted, however, when their Moscow hideout is raided by a cunning politician.

programme.title: The Terrorists
programme.desc: Attempting to secure the release of political prisoners, a terrorist group, led by the fierce Ray Petrie (Ian McShane), takes over a British plane. Tough Scandinavian operative Nils Tahlvik (Sean Connery) is sent in to deal with the armed men and free the aircraft's passengers. Unfortunately for Tahlvik, the terrorists prove to be quite formidable. Meanwhile, another unit of the same extremist organization is holding an English ambassador hostage, which further complicates matters.

programme.title: Hitman: Agent 47
programme.desc: Genetically engineered from conception to be the perfect killing machine, he's the culmination of decades of research, endowed with unprecedented strength, speed, stamina and intelligence. Known only as Agent 47 (Rupert Friend), his latest target is a corporation that plans to unlock the secret of his past to create an army of killers even more powerful than him. With help from a young woman, the elite assassin confronts revelations about his own origins in an epic battle with his deadliest foe.

programme.title: Monster Hunter
programme.desc: Behind our world, there is another -- a world of dangerous and powerful monsters that rule their domain with deadly ferocity. When Lt. Artemis and her loyal soldiers are transported from our world to the new one, the unflappable lieutenant receives the shock of her life. In a desperate battle for survival against enormous enemies with incredible powers and unstoppable, terrifying attacks, Artemis teams up with a mysterious hunter who has found a way to fight back.

programme.title: Alita: Battle Angel
programme.desc: Set several centuries in the future, the abandoned Alita is found in the scrapyard of Iron City by Ido, a compassionate cyber-doctor who takes the unconscious cyborg Alita to his clinic. When Alita awakens, she has no memory of who she is, nor does she have any recognition of the world she finds herself in. As Alita learns to navigate her new life and the treacherous streets of Iron City, Ido tries to shield her from her mysterious past.

programme.title: Real Steel
programme.desc: Charlie Kenton used to be a prizefighter but lost his chance to win a title when heavy, towering robots took over the boxing ring. Now working as a small-time promoter, Charlie pieces together scrap metal into low-end fighters, barely earning enough to make it from one underground venue to the next. After hitting rock bottom, Charlie reluctantly teams with his estranged son, Max, to build and train a championship robot for a last shot at redemption.

programme.title: Holmes And Watson
programme.desc: A humorous take on Arthur Conan Doyle's classic mysteries featuring Sherlock Holmes and Doctor Watson.

programme.title: Gigli
programme.desc: When small time street thug Larry Gigli meets a tough and gorgeous enforcer named Ricki, the sparks fly in this outrageous battle of the sexes.

programme.title: Another You
programme.desc: ANOTHER YOU is the uproarious slapstick comedy about a pathological liar who, upon his release from a mental clinic, becomes involved with a con man and ends up impersonating a billionaire. Scam follows double-scam in classic Pryor/Wilder style. Features Academy Award winner Mercedes Ruehl as a con who falls for Gene Wilder.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Ninja
programme.desc: A well-meaning but hopelessly inept ninja ventures to the Hills of Beverly to rescue a mysterious beauty.

programme.title: Annie (2014)
programme.desc: Wealthy businessman Benjamin Stacks comes to the aid of a young girl living in an orphanage run by the tyrannical Miss Hannigan.

programme.title: Jack And Jill
programme.desc: Jack Sadelstein (Adam Sandler) has his normal tranquil life turned upside down when his twin sister Jill (also Adam Sandler) arrives for visit.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Ninja
programme.desc: A well-meaning but hopelessly inept ninja ventures to the Hills of Beverly to rescue a mysterious beauty.

programme.title: Annie (2014)
programme.desc: Wealthy businessman Benjamin Stacks comes to the aid of a young girl living in an orphanage run by the tyrannical Miss Hannigan.

programme.title: Jack And Jill
programme.desc: Jack Sadelstein (Adam Sandler) has his normal tranquil life turned upside down when his twin sister Jill (also Adam Sandler) arrives for visit.

programme.title: The Other Guys
programme.desc: From the director of Step Brothers and Talladega Nights comes this utterly hilarious action-comedy starring comedy favorites Will Ferrell and Mark Wahlberg as two New York City desk cops who take a chance to step up their game and solve a huge crime.

programme.title: The Man From Toronto
programme.desc: The world's deadliest assassin and New York's biggest screw-up are mistaken for each other.

programme.title: Step Brothers
programme.desc: Brennan Huff, a sporadically employed thirty-nine-year-old who lives with his mother, Nancy. Dale Doback, a terminally unemployed forty-year-old who lives with his father, Robert. When Robert and Nancy marry and move in together, Brennan and Dale are forced to live with each other as step brothers.

programme.title: Drinking Buddies
programme.desc: Luke and Kate are co-workers at a Chicago brewery, where they spend their days drinking and flirting. They're perfect for each other, except that they're both in relationships.

programme.title: That's My Boy (2012)
programme.desc: A father moves in on the eve of his son's wedding and promptly begins feuding with the bride-to-be.

programme.title: Little Man
programme.desc: A short, baby-faced jewel thief masquerades as a baby to try to recover a stolen diamond.

programme.title: Major League II
programme.desc: The Indians are now a World Series contender. But last year's hunger is now replaced with complacency, and bad decisions by the new owner threaten to tear the team apart.

programme.title: Major League: Back To The Minors
programme.desc: A pitcher is about to be put out to pasture when he is given the opportunity to manage a team.

programme.title: Little Man
programme.desc: A short, baby-faced jewel thief masquerades as a baby to try to recover a stolen diamond.

programme.title: Major League II
programme.desc: The Indians are now a World Series contender. But last year's hunger is now replaced with complacency, and bad decisions by the new owner threaten to tear the team apart.

programme.title: Major League: Back To The Minors
programme.desc: A pitcher is about to be put out to pasture when he is given the opportunity to manage a team.

programme.title: Pixels
programme.desc: An unlikely group of former '80s video game champions step up to save the world from an alien invasion in this visually spectacular action-adventure.

programme.title: The Longest Yard (2005)
programme.desc: Prison inmates form a football team to challenge the prison guards.

programme.title: Joe Dirt (2001)
programme.desc: Jeers turn to cheers when a hard luck but plunky itinerant janitor becomes an unlikely hero.

programme.title: Joe Dirt (2001)
programme.desc: Jeers turn to cheers when a hard luck but plunky itinerant janitor becomes an unlikely hero.

programme.title: Here Comes The Boom
programme.desc: A biology teacher takes up fighting in mixed martial arts matches in order to raise money to save the music program at his school.

programme.title: Made Of Honor
programme.desc: Tom loves his life, until he realizes he also loves his best friend Hannah. But when Hannah gets engaged to a dashing Scotsman and asks Tom to be her maid of honor, Tom faces hostile bridesmaids, bridal showers, and bad hair days, all in an effort to pull off the perfect wedding and steal the bride. He&apos's a maid of honor with a plan.

programme.title: Grown Ups
programme.desc: From the guys who brought you PAUL BLART: MALL COP, five high school pals reunite after 30 years at a July 4th celebration and wrestle with the challenges of adulthood.

programme.title: Grown Ups 2
programme.desc: The all-star comedy cast from "Grown Ups" returns with some exciting new additions!

programme.title: The Producers
programme.desc: A down-on-his-luck producer and his accountant hit on a get-rich-quick scheme that backfires when their sure-fire flop becomes a hit.

programme.title: As Good As It Gets
programme.desc: The Academy Award-winning (best actor Jack Nicholson, best actress Helen Hunt) offbeat comedy celebrates the unique bond between three very different characters. Also stars Greg Kinnear.

programme.title: Eat Pray Love
programme.desc: At a crossroads in her life, Liz Gilbert (Julia Roberts) travels to Italy, India and Bali to discover meaning and happiness in this inspiring true story, based on the best-selling book.

programme.title: Think Like A Man
programme.desc: Four friends conspire to turn the tables on their women when they discover the ladies have been using Steve Harvey's relationship advice against them.

programme.title: The Other Guys
programme.desc: From the director of Step Brothers and Talladega Nights comes this utterly hilarious action-comedy starring comedy favorites Will Ferrell and Mark Wahlberg as two New York City desk cops who take a chance to step up their game and solve a huge crime.

programme.title: This Is The End
programme.desc: The end of the world is coming...and it's going to be hilarious.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Darrin is furious when Samantha gives his orange and green checked sport jacket, bought before he was married, to Good Will.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Samantha agrees to serve on a fund raising committee.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Shopping for antiques, Samantha is intrigued by an old chair which moves about to catch her attention.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Finding Samantha struggling to repair a lamp, Aunt Clara uses her uncertain powers of magic to summon an electrician. Benjamin Franklin, in l8th century clothes, appears. Samantha is upset by Ben's presence and Aunt Clara's wail that she can't remember how to undo the spell. Darrin, astonished by Ben's appearance in his home, can't convince Larry Tate that Ben is not is creation for an advertising campaign for Franklin Elec-tronics. Abner Kravitz refuses to believe Gladys' report that the real Ben Franklin is at the Stephens'. Bowing to Samantha's pleas, Darrin agrees to allow her and Aunt Clara to show Ben how his inventions are being used is the city. The next morning Ben, leaving a note that he has decided to tour the city alone to avoid causing domestic discord, sets out. Darrin, Samantha and Aunt Clara start searching for him. At a firehouse, inspecting an old fire engine, Ben steps on the accelerator. The engine shoots out into the street and slams into a curb. Ben is arrested and taken to court, where the judge, sure it is all a publicity stunt, charges him with grand larceny and sets bail at a thousand dollars. Darrin puts up the bail, knowing he will lose it if Ben doesn't appear for trial is a month. Just then, Aunt Clara remembers the spell and Ben vanishes.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Summing up "My Friend Ben" Samantha tells how Aunt Clara, trying to summon an electrician to fix a lamp, produces Ben Franklin instead.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Samantha tells Aunt Clara she plans to get a bank loan in order to tear down the gazebo and build a rumpus room.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Samantha helps twelve year old Johnny Mills get his Soap Box Derby Racer to the practice area.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Darrin asks Samantha to loin him in watching moon pictures on TV, but she replies she's already been there.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Darrin's client, the Solow Toy Company, sponsors HoHo the Clown on TV.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Endora's gift of a unique car sends Darrin's client into a spin.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.sub-title: The Corn Is As High As A Guernsey's Eye
programme.desc: Samantha steals a cow, thinking it is Aunt Clara.

programme.title: Bewitched

programme.desc: Samantha saves Aunt Clara from banishment.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: To trap Darrin with another woman, Endora gives him three wishes.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Darrin gets into trouble when Endora gives him a perfect memory.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Eudora substitutes a masterpiece for one of Samantha's paintings.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: An old-rivalry upsets Darrin, but Samantha proves he's a winner after all.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Larry almost loses an important client when Aunt Clara conjures up Queen Victoria.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Unless Samantha can prevent Darrin from kissing a pretty girl, he will age five hundred years.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Annoyed by Darrin's popularity, Endora makes everybody hate him.

programme.desc: Darrin resents Endora's help with his career.

Mary and Sandra vie for a chance to deliver a line in a movie being shot at their building.
Sandra's show-biz career as a talk-show host threatens the friendship of the whole group when she questions them on the air about sex in the eighties.
Rose receives an offer to buy her building from a real estate magnate whose plan to renovate means tearing down 227.
In charge of the big choir competition, Mary must make room in her have for the visiting choir's deacon, who is notoriously arrogant, thoughtless and pushy.
Alarmed by Brenda and her friends' casual attitude about teen pregnancy, Mary uses some unusual methods to teach them a lesson about parenting that they'll never forget.
Mary is delighted to learn that Lester will be named "Man of the Year" by the local Men's Club...and distraught upon discovering she's not allowed to attend the special ceremony.
To protest the opening of a sleazy club in her neighborhood, Mary dreams of running the varmints out of town.
In an effort to help Lester build his business, Mary takes some questionable steps to land him a big construction contract.
Mary and Lester are shocked when his cousin Ed's enviable "picture-perfect" marriage suddenly falls apart.

When Mary and Sandra go to court to settle a dispute over song royalties, Sandra's ammunition is veteran "barrister" John Houseman, while Mary's ace in the hole is a "Supreme" expert witness, singer Mary Wilson.
Mayhem and murder plague 227 when a mysterious man with a knife rents an apartment in Mary's building.

When Mary and Lester go to the reading of his uncle's will, they are both surprised to learn they have distant cousins whom they've never met, and even more confused when they discover they are a different color.
When Lester's old high school sweetheart comes to the neighborhood in search of a new home, Mary fears that she'll try to move in on more than just her turf.
Suffering from a very cold winter spell, the residents of "227" invade Mary and Lester's apartment, which is one of two apartments with heat.
When Mary and Lester's school teacher friend Mitchell meets Sandra, he sets out to win her pampered heart, no matter how many gifts or expensive dates it takes.
After a whirlwind courtship, Sandra accepts Mitchell's wedding proposal, making a commitment to trade in her glamorous life for what she not-so-long-ago considered a boring existence.

programme.title: Underworld: Blood Wars
programme.desc: The fifth installment of the Underworld franchise.

programme.title: Wild Things II
programme.desc: Keeping your friends close and your enemies closer has never been more important...or more dangerous. The girls of Blue Bay are back, and they're wilder than ever in this seductive sequel where no one is innocent and nothing is what it appears to be.

programme.title: Whiplash
programme.desc: Winner of 3 Academy Awards, WHIPLASH tells the story of an ambitious student drummer (Miles Teller) and his ruthless teacher (J.K. Simmons) who will stop at nothing to achieve perfection.

programme.title: Baby Driver
programme.desc: Coerced into working for a crime boss, a young getaway driver must face the music when a doomed heist threatens his life, love & freedom.

programme.title: The Rundown (2003)
programme.desc: A bounty hunter travels to the Amazon to retrieve the son of a mob boss.

programme.title: Faster
programme.desc: An ex-con sets out to avenge his brother's death after they were double-crossed during a heist years ago. During his campaign, however, he's tracked by a veteran cop and an egocentric hit man.

programme.title: Money Monster
programme.desc: Lee Gates, a bombastic television stock huckster, is taken hostage on his TV show by an outraged gunman. As much of the world watches live, Gates must keep himself alive and, with help from the woman who produces the show, uncover the truth behind a tangle of big money lies.

programme.title: Baby Driver
programme.desc: Coerced into working for a crime boss, a young getaway driver must face the music when a doomed heist threatens his life, love & freedom.

programme.title: Black Hawk Down
programme.desc: Based on the true story of a war waged in Mogadishu by the high tech Black Hawk helicopters and the US Army Rangers and Deltas.

programme.title: Priest (2011)
programme.desc: A warrior priest tracks down a band of renegade vampires who have kidnapped his niece.

programme.title: The Taking Of Pelham 1 2 3 (2009)
programme.desc: In The Taking of Pelham 1 2 3, Denzel Washington stars as New York City subway dispatcher Walter Garber, whose ordinary day is thrown into chaos by an audacious crime: the hijacking of a subway train.

programme.title: The Art Of War
programme.desc: Shaw is an operative for the United Nations' covert dirty-tricks squad, using espionage and quasi-ethical tactics to secure peace and cooperation. When a shipping container full of dead Vietnamese refugees turns up on the docks and China's ambassador is gunned down at a dinner celebrating a new trade agreement with China and the US, Shaw is framed for the murder and must evade the FBI and Triad gangsters to find out what is really going on.

programme.title: Missionary Man
programme.desc: A mysterious stranger rolls into town on a unique motorcycle. All he carries is the bible and a desire for justice. Past vengeance collides as Ryder rights an injustice from his past and liberates the small town from a malicious oppressor.

programme.title: Ladder 49
programme.desc: Trapped in a fire that looks likely to kill him, a fireman takes the opportunity to look back over his life, career and marriage, while he waits for his company,Ladder 49, to rescue him, if they can.

programme.title: Silverado
programme.desc: Four drifters arrive in a small frontier town and become unlikely heroes in a battle against a powerful family and a corrupt sheriff.

programme.title: Vertical Limit
programme.desc: A brother mounts an extraordinary rescue effort to save his sister who is trapped on the world's most dangerous peak.

programme.title: Ivanhoe (1982)
programme.desc: Sir Walter Scott's epic novel of timeless romance and knightly daring comes to life! The year is 1194. At long last, the noble knight Wilfred of Ivanhoe (Anthony Andrews) has returned from the Crusades to regain his title and win the hand of his beloved Lady Rowena (Lysette Anthony).

programme.title: In the Line of Fire
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood delivers the goods as a veteran Secret Service agent whose shameful secret is known to the serial killer that eludes him.

programme.title: Salt
programme.desc: Angelina Jolie stars in Columbia Pictures' Salt, a contemporary espionage thriller. Before becoming a CIA officer, Evelyn Salt (Jolie) swore an oath to duty, honor, and country. She will prove loyal to these when a defector accuses her of being a Russian sleeper spy. Salt goes on the run, using all her skills and years of experience as a covert operative to elude capture, protect her husband, and stay one step ahead of her colleagues at the CIA.

programme.title: The Girl With The Dragon Tattoo
programme.desc: Journalist Mikael Blomkvist is aided in his search for a woman who has been missing for forty years by Lisbeth Salander, a young computer hacker.

programme.title: Wild Things
programme.desc: A schoolgirl's accusation of sexual assault triggers a scandal in a wealthy Florida yachting enclave.

programme.title: Lake Placid (1999)
programme.desc: A female paleontologist from New York City heads to Maine where local fish and game officials have discovered a gigantic and deadly 30-foot crocodile that appears to be living in one of the local .akes.

programme.title: Battle: Los Angeles
programme.desc: A platoon of Marines battles an alien invasion on the streets of Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Dark Tower (2017)
programme.desc: Roland & the Man in Black share an ancient vendetta, they must fight to the death in an epic battle over the fate of the Universe.

programme.title: Battlefield Earth
programme.desc: Humanity is enslaved by gold-thirsty tyrants, whose 'man-animals' are about to ignite a rebellion.

programme.desc: When the human race is on the verge of extinction, one of the last survivors on earth, an extraordinary young woman, goes on a mission to track down her younger brother who was abducted by the extra-terrestial creatures colonizing earth.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels (2000)
programme.desc: They're beautiful, they're brilliant and they work for Charlie.

programme.title: Breaking Bad - Pilot
programme.desc: A high school chemistry teacher resorts to selling drugs in order to provide for his family.

programme.title: Breaking Bad
programme.desc: Their first aborted drug deal leaves Walt and Jesse to dispose of a pair of corpses, while Skyler suspects that her husband is up to no good.

programme.title: Breaking Bad
programme.sub-title: And The Bag's In The River
programme.desc: As Walt cleans up the mess that was left following his first drug deal, Skyler's getting too close to the truth about his double life forces him to consider telling her the truth about his illness.

programme.title: Breaking Bad
programme.desc: Being forced to reveal the truth about his illness leaves Walt facing the prospect of how to pay for an expensive series of cancer treatments.

programme.title: Breaking Bad
programme.desc: Skyler organizes an intervention to persuade Walt into accepting his former research partner's generous offer to pay for his cancer treatments.

programme.title: Breaking Bad
programme.desc: As the side effects and cost of his treatment quickly mounts, Walt's demand that he find a wholesaler to buy their drugs lands Jesse in trouble with a hardened ex-con.

programme.desc: Jimmy calls in a favor from Mike. Meanwhile, new complications disrupt the Salamancas' business; and Chuck and Jimmy struggle to compromise.

programme.desc: The county's efforts to buy a cemetery exposes Burton's responsibility for a ill-fated abortion fifty-years ago.

programme.desc: Comedy series providing an honest, uplifting and heart-warming portrayal of the lives of working-class teenagers from Liverpool while tackling issues with a refreshing humour. It's Aimee's big night at the opening of the school play, but will she show with deepening problems at home and the rest of school thinking that she posted defamatory TikToks? Meanwhile, Reece's middle-class cousin Tyreece comes to stay with him and Jodie - he's been given a final warning by the police and his mum wants him to get away from the 'bad influence' mates she believes to be the problem, but he wastes no time in stealing some parcels from a delivery van to impress the boys. When Christopher's mum's ring goes missing, Christopher believes Reece took it as he's the only person who knew where he kept it - their burgeoning relationship is rocked as their class assumptions about each other are back to the fore, but Reece is forced to make a tough decision when he discovers who actually did steal the ring.

programme.title: Count Abdulla
programme.desc: Comedy series about twenty-something British-Pakistani Muslim doctor Abdulla Khan. After gatecrashing Amrita's sister Preethi's hen night, Abdulla is introduced as Amrita's new Sikh boyfriend and Preethi is beyond excited to welcome him to the family - so much so, in fact, that she insists that he comes to the wedding. Franck is less than pleased that he isn't on the list, but he is determined to make an appearance too in a bid to woo the family - meanwhile, Kathy is on notice from the coven to do away with her Abdulla problem and seeks out old friend and yoga-loving Hindu vampire Rishi. When Abdulla realises what Franck is planning, he makes a mad dash to the wedding to try and intercept him before it's too late - little does he know, though, that Shafi has also turned up to sabotage what he thinks are Abdulla's nuptials at an Indian wedding that lasts long in the memory.

programme.desc: Animated comedy about the everyday trials and tribulations of family life. Brian moves to Hollywood to pursue his dream as a scriptwriter, but ends up directing porn.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Animated series about family man Stan Smith, who works for the CIA. After Francine tells Stan that she is looking for excitement in their marriage, Stan becomes involved in drag racing to spice things up. Meanwhile, Hayley breaks up with her boyfriend Jeff, who is emotionally crushed until he joins Steve's world of online gaming. When Hayley finds out, she tries to sabotage their fun.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Animated series from the creator of Family Guy about Stan Smith, who works for the CIA and is constantly on the alert for terrorist activity. When Stan tries to trick Steve into attending summer camp, things go horribly wrong and Steve ends up in a refugee camp. Stan, being the eternal optimist, joins Steve and manages to stage a camp Olympics between the refugees and the rebel faction living across the river.

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: A body is found in the canals of Oxford and the only clue to its identity points to a connection with one of the colleges - there is just one question for Morse... which of the highly respected contenders for a prestigious post is the killer?

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The Clarets XI old boys' cricket team gather in Oxford for their annual match, but one of the team meets an untimely death before the first ball is bowled - as Morse pieces together the clues, he realises that the Clarets players have more than cricket on their minds.

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: Crime drama series about the young Detective Constable Endeavour Morse. When the body of a disreputable journalist found in mysterious circumstances as 1966 draws to a close threatens to expose unspeakable horrors from the past, Endeavour and Thursday find themselves confronted by a wall of silence and a disparate group of men unwilling to talk as their investigation deepens. The two men must band together and peel back layers of corruption, extending to the upper echelons of Oxford society in a police force that is increasingly tainted by cronyism, as they steel themselves for a reckoning in blood...

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Crime thriller featuring the author's much-loved spinster sleuth. Miss Marple arrives at the luxurious Bertram's Hotel but soon discovers that there are dark secrets lurking below the highly polished veneer - when one of the maids is murdered, she tries to learn the truth before the murderer strikes again... however, the reality is far more sinister than even she is prepared for.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When a pub landlady is crushed to death during a magic show in Midsomer Oaks, Barnaby and Nelson uncover conflict between the village church and ancient pagan traditions. Is famous magician Gideon Latimer to blame or is he the target?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby investigates whether a ballad made famous by a late lamented folk singer could have been the inspiration for a murder - did someone want to kill Toby Winning for threatening to take the Little Crosby Folk Festival away from Midsomer, or could the true motive have been hidden for 20 years?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby tries to find out just who is targeting the Midsomer Vinae Winery - what does the attack have to do with the death of a child in a hit-and-run accident?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Crime drama series. Wealthy landowner Gregory Lancaster breathes his last surrounded by his wife Hermione, his daughter Rose, and Rose's partner Craig Coffley - Dr Isaac Vernon confirms the death as Gregory's son, Antarctic expedition leader Felix, arrives just too late to see his father. Undertakers Caleb Southwood and Ellie Loxley go to the body only to discover that it has gone missing - when the Barnabys and Betty see Nelson arrive with the news, Barnaby and Nelson find new pathologist Kam Karimore in place at Malton Hall and Nelson tells Barnaby that they have got off on the wrong foot. Concluding that the body was removed via the window, Barnaby and Nelson interview the family and learn that Felix plans to affect a quick sale while a visit from the Reverend Melissa Ackers shows bad blood between the family and the vicar - when the body of the Lancasters' ex-nanny is stolen from the graveyard, Barnaby and Nelson are drawn into a macabre world as they seek to identify the culprit.

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Crime drama series based on characters created by Ann Cleeves. DCI Vera Stanhope investigates when the body of the co-owner of a chip shop is found in his own freezer - a seemingly successful entrepreneur and dedicated family man, Vera uncovers secrets, lies and some unforgivable behaviour as she tries to unwrap the case. Once the investigation begins, it soon becomes apparent that our enigmatic entrepreneur has left behind debts, broken promises, ruined lives and seriously interfered in family business that was not his own - now Vera must find who is responsible for the this unsavoury chip shop assault and battery.

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: Morse and Lewis investigate a murder in a quiet country church where a vicar and his voluntary helpers are the unlikely prime suspects - although at first baffled, and more at home in a pub than a pulpit, Morse pursues his investigations religiously.

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Enduring '70s British sitcom about a chirpy driver and his conductor pal who torment the long-suffering inspector of the Luxton Bus Company. Inspector Blake demands that all bus crews pass a first aid test or be suspended.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Enduring '70s British sitcom about a chirpy driver and his conductor pal who torment the long-suffering inspector of the Luxton Bus Company. Stan and Arthur decide to splash out on a new loo.

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: Morse and Lewis investigate a baffling murder in a multi-storey car park where the only clues are a diary and a parking ticket - a jealous husband, an unfaithful wife, and a playboy architect add up to murder.

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: Inspector Morse and Sergeant Lewis focus their attention on a respectable academic family as they investigate the death of an eminent scientist who was attacked before he was due to deliver a controversial speech about the environment.

programme.title: Rosemary & Thyme
programme.desc: Light-hearted drama series. When Rosemary and Laura are employed by Regent's Park to help recreate the original Victorian planting in the historic Avenue Garden, they meet a variety of characters for whom the central London park plays a regular part in their daily life - however, the beauty and peace of the Avenue is shattered when Harley Street psychiatrist Pavel Volkar is found murdered. As Rosemary and Laura adopt Mr Volkar's bereaved three-legged dog Holly - who seems to have more than a canine understanding of events - the mystery surrounding the accident in which Holly lost her leg appears to be the key ingredient to solving the case.

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Crime thriller featuring the author's much-loved spinster sleuth. When Miss Marple is overjoyed to be attending the wedding of her old housemaid, she finds a house full of secrets and a family desperately trying to come to terms with the fact that their brother was sent to the gallows for a murder that he did not commit.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Crime drama series. Forest ranger Felicity Ward is driving at night when she is blinded by a searing light from an unidentified flying object - the following morning sees her car found abandoned at the roadside. Barnaby is called to the crime scene where a black pod containing Felicity's body is discovered - meanwhile, the nearby village of Cooper Hill is buzzing with news of the UFO as hoteliers Victor and Nadine Campbell, their daughter Orla, tour operator Abigail Tonev and her garage-owning son Nathan rely on a stream of ufologists for their businesses. Barnaby and Nelson visit Felicity's mother Valerie and fiance Brogan and they reveal that Felicity was going to confront ufologist Carter Faulkner about an illegal campsite - as they dig deeper, Barnaby and Nelson unearth suspicions, betrayals, and long-buried secrets of a terrestrial nature in their search for the truth.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Crime drama series. A cycle road race reaches its thrilling finale as Greg Eddon overtakes teammate Mitch McCordell to win, but Team DJM owner Des McCordell is annoyed that Greg disobeyed his team orders and rival team manager Reece Dexter is bitterly disappointed that his team lost. As Greg warms down, an unseen assailant throws him from his bike and moves in for the kill... When news comes of the murder, DS Nelson explains the situation to DCI Barnaby while race official Damien Lamerat and local organiser Mary Appleton offer their cooperation and Des outlines the stakes when he tells Barnaby that this race is a make-or-break event for the cyclists. As Barnaby and Nelson investigate, they find themselves drawn into a ruthlessly competitive world of blackmail, bribery and bloodshed where winning comes at any cost.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Crime drama series. Brandon Monkford proudly introduces artist Lance Auden at the launch of his new sculpture park - the guests head into the floodlit woods and Clemmy Staples is spooked by her boyfriend Brin Dunne before discovering Brandon's body arranged on Lance's centrepiece sculpture. Kam finds a broken locket near the body at the murder scene before Barnaby speaks with the family - Brandon's wife Alexandra is shocked, but son Fabian explains that the villagers were opposed to the park and that Brin had formed a group called VASP (Villagers Against the Sculpture Park). After the family deny recognising the locket, Lance claims he got on well with Brandon but fellow artist Simeon Rowling suggests that Brandon upset some artists and critic Daniel Fargo reveals Brandon received hate mail. As Barnaby and Nelson investigate, they have to get creative if they are to crack a case where art imitates death and everything has a deeper meaning.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The discovery of a saint's bones at an archaeological dig causes a stir in the village of Midsomer Cicely, but when the leader of the dig is murdered, DCI Barnaby and DS Nelson soon realise that it is not only skeletons that have been long buried in the hallowed ground.

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: The first of two compelling final chapters in the crime drama starring Brenda Blethyn as DCI Vera Stanhope bids farewell. Vera nets two cases when an ex-prisoner's body is discovered on the banks of the Tyne - has our former inmate been served cold justice, or does his death run deeper?

programme.title: Joan
programme.desc: Drama series starring Sophie Turner as Joan Hannington, a notorious jewel thief in the 1980s. Boisie's warehouse is reduced to embers by the IRA and Joan is attacked in prison as a warning to keep quiet - Joan is then released on bail but faces a potential ten-year sentence for her part in stealing the Stubbs painting. Joan is angry with Boisie for landing her in this situation and resolves to run - Boisie agrees to go too and Joan plans an inside man heist at Bernard's jewellers to fund their escape to Spain. Boisie is uneasy, especially since Joan intends to kidnap Kelly, and suggests that he could come back for her later - when the pair begin to plan the job with Albie and realise that they will need a fourth man to help, Albie suggests armed robber Paul Mills. As Boisie and Albie conduct reconnaissance on Bernard's shop, Joan attends Kelly's seventh birthday feeling a growing distance from her and visits her dying father hoping that he will apologise for abusing her as a child.

programme.title: Joan
programme.desc: Drama series starring Sophie Turner as Joan Hannington, a notorious jewel thief in the 1980s. It's the day before the heist and Joan is preparing to gain access to Kelly's school - Albie has arranged for Kelly's name to be included on her forged passport and he urges her to tell Boisie her plan. Boisie, Joan and Albie meet up with Paul to run through the final details - as Joan returns to work, Tom watches from a car nearby. Before Joan can tell Boisie the truth, he discovers the suitcase Joan has packed for Kelly - Boisie is furious, but Joan begs him to go through with the heist and their plan for a new life together. Boisie relents, but Paul pulls out on heist day and Joan insists that Albie find a last-minute replacement. Albie waits in the back alley as Joan seduces Bernard - Boisie and the new recruit break in holding them both at gunpoint, but Joan plays the innocent victim before being shocked to discover that Paul's replacement is someone from her past.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series set in a 1960s Yorkshire village. A schoolgirl witnesses a shooting incident on the local moors, and Greengrass sets up a pool competition without Gina's knowledge.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series set in a 1960s Yorkshire village. Nick and Jo's wedding day finally arrives, but the groom is stranded on the moors as the church fills up - Meanwhile, Blaketon gets a shock when he is summoned to see his boss.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Piano student Zoe Stock has won a place at the Devington Manor Winter School led by internationally renowned musician Sir Michael Fielding when, from the riverbank in the grounds of the manor, she sees a woman jump from the bridge and disappear underwater - when Barnaby and Jones start investigating the possible drowning, they discover unsavoury connections to the past that could prove lethal 20 years later. Can they intervene before the body count escalates, and will the talented Zoe survive her master class?

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Matthew agrees to give Nicola a job if she can drum up some business for his company before the end of the day. Eli realises getting rid of Danielle will not be an easy task.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Eli grows tired of Danielle's presence and arranges for her to stay at a hostel, Nicola tries to make up with Rodney, and Ashley learns that the church is threatened by closure.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: A furious Tina sets off to confront David, while Darryl tries to warn him, Deirdre is upset when Blanche reveals the content of Ken's novel, and Carla asks Rosie a favour.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Ken refuses to discuss his novel with Deirdre, leaving the couple at loggerheads. Jason demands some answers from Steve about Becky and a sullen Tina rebuffs David.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series set in a 1960s Yorkshire village. New constable Mike Bradley finds that Aidensfield is not the rural retreat he expected, and Greengrass finds himself in the thick of the action when a local construction site is raided by armed robbers.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series set in a 1960s Yorkshire village. Ventress faces up to some old enemies while Greengrass takes on more than he bargained for when a troop of Girl Guides camps on his land.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The funfair and daredevil riders of the wall of death make their annual visit to Midsomer village Whitcombe Mallet. When the owner of an equestrian centre is trampled by his horse, DCI Barnaby and DS Nelson have to unravel a complex feud from the past where nothing is what it seems.

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Crime drama. Alphy attempts to cook a romantic dinner for Meg with Mrs C's help, but she doesn't show any signs of leaving once Meg turns up - when the two of them get a moment alone, they make a pact that should this evening be a disaster, they'll agree to part ways amicably. Mrs C once again interrupts - the Reverend Lane, the vicar who tried to replace Alphy, is outside and seeking sanctuary with a woman he claims is his niece. Soon enough, more strangers arrive with Geordie in hot pursuit - there's been a murder at a strip club and these are all the suspects. When Leonard arrives lonely without Daniel, it's not long before all hope of a romantic evening has gone out the window - with everyone assembled, the group attempts to reconstruct the mysterious circumstances leading to the death of the club's owner 'Madam'. Crammed into the vicarage, they try to make sense of a missing murder weapon, varying accounts of the victim's character, and a reverend who tries to flee the scene.

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Crime drama. Alphy agrees to help his old friend Reverend Potts, who runs a foundling home for children - with the news that the house will close, a series of 'otherworldly' goings-on have caused disruption amongst the kids. Potts hopes that Alphy can connect with them and reinstate some faith and stability - what he finds is the home in a sorry state housing a sickly teenager, a seemingly sinister nurse, and evidence of witchcraft. That night, a teenager is found dead at the bottom of the stairs - when it's clear the local police won't give these 'broken' children a proper investigation, Alphy calls Geordie. As Geordie starts to suspect Potts, however, Alphy derails the investigation by defending him a little too hard - elsewhere, Leonard turns more and more to drink back home and has harsh words for Mrs C that are hard to take back, and Cathy has her own struggles at work and quits her job when her manager refuses to take her seriously.

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Another case in Sally Wainwright's acclaimed drama series which focuses on the professional and personal lives of two Manchester detectives. DCI Gill Murray and DC Rachel Bailey go to Bristol to advise on a rape and murder case which bears striking similarities to an infamous case from 13 years ago. At the time of the original case, Gill helped catch the perpetrator Jeremy Leach, who was convicted for the rape and murder of four women but is now claiming that he is innocent. Another woman has been raped and killed using Leach's exact MO; could the real murderer still be out there? At home, Rachel discovers that her brother Dom is prostituting himself in her flat. She is furious and also heartbroken to realise that this is how Dom got by in prison. Later, Rachel learns that the CPS will not be charging her ex-boyfriend Nick Savage with her attempted murder. Both she and Gill are appalled, and Rachel wonders how on earth she could have once been in love with such a man.

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Detective drama series. The team investigates when the body of an eight-year-old boy is discovered, but as they search for the paedophile killer, they are unaware that the culprit has placed himself at the heart of the child's grieving family. Meanwhile, Dom's HIV test is negative, but he does something stupid in his relief which jeopardises Rachel's sergeant's exam. At the same time, Sean thinks that he and Rachel are destined to be together - although she is not convinced - and when Janet is persuaded to give things a go with Andy, she finds herself having doubts.

programme.title: Tomorrow Never Dies
programme.desc: The 18th entry in the James Bond film series. Media tycoon Elliot Carver is one of the most powerful men in the world - his newspaper Tomorrow is a world leader in that industry, and he is about to launch a satellite network to capitalise on his success. However, he is hungry for more business - especially from the Asian market - and when a British Royal Navy ship is mysteriously sunk in the South China Sea by unknown means and any survivors of the attack are killed afterwards, Tomorrow manages to be first to tell the world that the survivors' bodies were riddled with Chinese bullets. China repeatedly denies any responsibility for the attack, but Admiral Roebuck of the Royal Navy insists that China are to blame. However, M - the venerable boss of MI6 - suspects that there is more to the attack and therefore sends James Bond on a mission to find the real cause behind the sinking of the British ship. Can 007 do so and stop war breaking out between Britain and China?

Can 007 do so and stop war breaking out between Britain and China?

programme.desc: ...Play-Off Highlights. Action from the League One Play-Off final between Stockport County and Bolton Wanderers at Wembley Stadium, with a place in the Championship on the line. [S]

programme.desc: Steven Seagal and Gary Busey, 1992. An ex-Navy SEAL-turned-cook is called upon to thwart a group of terrorists who seize control of a US battleship.

programme.title: Snatch
programme.desc: After patching things up with Saul, the boys get a lead on liquidating the gold bars, thanks to Chloe. But the buyer, a wealthy sheik, proves finicky.

programme.title: Robson and Jim's Fly Fishing Adventure
programme.desc: Actors and best friends Robson Green and Jim Murray continue their search for big fish on another incredible fly-fishing adventure. In this episode, Robson and Jim head to the River Towy in Wales to fish for sea trout before heading to Jim's childhood holiday destination - Abersoch - to fish for bass.

programme.title: Motorsport Mundial
programme.desc: This programme brings you up to date with the latest action from the world of motorsport and features race coverage, insights, and behind-the-scenes footage from the planet's biggest and best motorsport series. These include the World Rally Championship (WRC), Formula One, World Motocross, NASCAR, British Touring Cars and much more.

programme.title: Unwind with ITV
