programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: Hide-and-seek turns deadly when Tubbs and Crockett attempt to protect a renegade CIA agent's (Dean Stockwell) Soviet wife and child.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: Gina seeks Crockett's help in finding a victim willing to press assault charges against a Bolivian banker's son; guest El DeBarge.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: A former Vietnam correspondent (Bob Balaban) shows up raving about an officer (G. Gordon Liddy) who returned with a fortune in heroin.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: A clever con artist (Phil Collins) plays a deadly game with cocaine dealers whom Crockett and Tubbs are shadowing.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: Castillo attempts to organize the surrender of a crime boss; a mysterious woman (Arielle Dombasle) eyes Crockett; guest Ted Nugent.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: When Crockett learns drug smuggling led to a former lover's death, he and Tubbs take confiscated cocaine to lure the men responsible.

programme.title: Miami Vice

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: The team abides by a cult's nonviolent philosophy to defeat corrupt townspeople who burned their community building.

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: The team recalls incidents of Murdock's bravery and loyalty while he lies badly wounded by a bullet meant for Hannibal.

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: The team flies to Miami to wage war against gangsters threatening to take over a resort hotel owned by two sisters.

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: Tawnia recruits the team to save her adventurer fiancé, captured by Amazon River pirates while searching for a lost city.

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: The captured team discovers a secret in the jungle and must enlist El Cajon's assistance to destroy a deadly installation.

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: The team helps a fire chief (Stepfanie Kramer) save her one-truck company from takeover by a larger operation.

programme.title: The A-Team

programme.title: Bionic Woman
programme.desc: Jaime poses as a singer to find out what happened to a missing OSI agent.

programme.title: Bionic Woman
programme.desc: A scientist (John Houseman) coveting an OSI device replaces agency secretaries with robot doubles.

programme.title: Bionic Woman
programme.desc: After having Jaime brutally beaten, Franklin lures Steve Austin into the clutches of his robot women.

programme.title: Bionic Woman
programme.desc: Jaime and Steve travel by submarine to Franklin's island, held in the eye of an artificially created hurricane.

programme.title: Knight Rider
programme.desc: A magazine publisher's daughter links her father's murder to a top-secret expose.

programme.title: Knight Rider

programme.title: Emergency!

programme.title: Emergency!

programme.title: Emergency!

programme.title: Emergency!

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: Crockett and Tubbs examine the crayon scrawls at murder sites, unaware they are the work of a psychotic teenager (Fiona Flanagan).

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: Crockett and Tubbs track a Grand Prix race-car driver after the body of a slain prostitute is thrown from his speeding car.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: A smitten Crockett places both of the detectives' lives in danger when he teams with a beautiful French Interpol agent in a search for a murderous international criminal.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: Crockett vows to expose a debt-ridden judge (Bill Russell) who asked his basketball-star son to throw a game.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: Someone shadows Crockett while he and Tubbs work with a government agent to set up a reclusive drug smuggler (Frank Zappa).

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: When assassins kidnap a Latin American activist's daughter, Crockett and Tubbs face a dilemma; guest Bianca Jagger.

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: The team interrupts a war between crime syndicates to rescue a government witness's (Dana Elcar) daughter (Leah Ayres).

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: B.A., Hannibal and cohorts infiltrate a car factory to capture a gang of ruthless auto-parts thieves.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates the murder of a gourmet restaurant owner who had been the victim of an extortionist.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A TV-network executive murders her boss and lover when he fails to promote her.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo suspects a psychologist (Nicol Williamson), a noted expert in mind control, is guilty of murder.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: An Irish poet, who fronts a peace organization while secretly running guns, kills an arms dealer who tries to swindle him.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A Hollywood director tries to fool Columbo when a studio becomes a murder scene.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The detective is called in to investigate the death of a sergeant major at a training camp.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Homicide detective Lieutenant Columbo investigates the murder of a famous painter's ex-wife.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates the disappearance of the director of a men's magazine.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The disheveled detective investigates the apparent suicide of a notorious racketeer who was facing an indictment.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: When a crooked estate agent dies in prison, his widow vows to exact her revenge on the two men that put him there. After killing her husband's informing boss, she sets her sights on Lieutenant Columbo.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A dentist frames his wife for a murder in order to keep up his image and expensive lifestyle.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A famous romance novelist is shot dead in the course of what looks like a robbery.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The rumpled lieutenant is invited to give a college lecture on criminology but ends up investigating the murder of one of the institution's professors.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates the murder of a crime show host's rival with incriminating evidence.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo is put to the test against an equally brilliant, criminal defense lawyer who murders his rock star girlfriend.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A police detective questions a jewelry-store owner whose late nephew had a winning lottery ticket.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo attends his nephew's wedding and as the couple get ready to leave on their honeymoon, the bride disappears; Columbo investigates and suspects his nephew may have made a few enemies on the police force.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates a hit-and-run, followed by a car explosion.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Two women kill their two-timing lover but have solid alibis; one of the women tries to seduce Columbo to keep him off her trail.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates a case involving argumentative radio talk show host Fielding Chase.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The detective is put on the case of a man who murders his brother.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo matches wits with a forensics specialist, helping his girlfriend to frame her husband for a stockbroker's murder.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The inimitable cop must prove that a flamboyant Hollywood gossip reporter was murdered by her former lover.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A Hollywood film composer and conductor murders a talented, young musician out of jealousy.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates the apparent suicide of a tabloid reporter in the Los Angeles rave scene.

programme.title: Prescription: murder
programme.desc: A psychiatrist uses a patient, he is having an affair with to help him kill his wife. His perfect alibi may come apart at the hands of a seemingly befuddled LAPD lieutenant.

programme.title: Ransom for a Dead Man
programme.desc: Lt. Columbo (Peter Falk) outwits a lawyer (Lee Grant) who has killed her husband but made it look like a kidnapping.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A blackmailer interferes with a mystery writer's scheme to kill his former partner in a perfect crime.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates the case of an unfaithful wife who was murdered when she refused to be blackmailed.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: No body, no weapon and a witness courted by the war hero she thinks committed murder, complicate a case.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo is caught in a case of stolen art and murder with evidence pointing to an innocent woman.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A competition between bitter siblings for ownership of a family-owned corporation, after their father's untimely death, escalates into murder.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: An explosion kills an executive as he calls his wife from a car phone, and suspicion falls on a company attorney.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo excavates the area surrounding the newly poured foundation of a building to search for a corpse.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A botanical collector involves his nephew in a kidnapping to break a trust fund, then murders him to finance his hobby.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The mistress of a conductor becomes a target for murder after threatening to tell all to her lover's wife.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A football-team manager (Robert Culp) establishes an electronic alibi for the murder of the team owner (Dean Stockwell) during a game; guests Valerie Harper, Susan Howard, James Gregory, Dean Jagger.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo journeys to London to observe Scotland Yard, but winds up investigating murders committed by two Shakespearean actors.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The ongoing feud between an out-of-favor Hollywood actress and a gossip columnist results in murder. Guest star: Anne Baxter.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A surgeon kills a nurse who suspects him of intentionally botching the heart surgery of his colleague, a cardiac expert.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: An American chess champion plays a private match with his challenger and kills him because the man is a better player.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Twins (Martin Landau in a dual role) kill their wealthy uncle just before his marriage to a younger woman.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A cosmetics manufacturer is suspected of murdering an employee (Martin Sheen) who stole a wrinkle-removing formula.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A wine connoisseur kills his playboy brother to prevent his selling the family winery to expiate his latest scandal.

programme.title: The People Under the Stairs
programme.desc: Hoping to find a fortune in gold, a boy instead discovers the horrific secrets lurking inside the home of two murderous siblings.","large":"When young Fool (Brandon Adams) breaks into the home of his family's greedy and uncaring landlords, he discovers a disturbing scenario where incestuous adult siblings have mutilated a number of boys and kept them imprisoned under stairs in their large, creepy house. As Fool attempts to flee before the psychopaths can catch him, he meets their daughter, Alice (A.J. Langer), who has been spared any extreme discipline by her deranged parents. Can Fool and Alice escape before it's too late?

programme.title: Phantom of the Opera
programme.desc: An acid-scarred composer (Claude Rains) rises from the Paris sewers to boost his favorite opera understudy's (Susanna Foster) career.","large":"Talented Christine (Susanna Foster) is unaware that her singing lessons are being funded by a secret admirer, Enrique (Claude Rains), a mysterious violinist with a disfigured face. Christine's colleagues become suspicious when mysterious accidents start occurring at the Paris Opera House, as the deaths coincide with her meteoric rise to stardom. Christine's suitors, Raoul (Edgar Barrier) and Anatole (Nelson Eddy), brave the dark recesses of the opera house to find the true culprit.

programme.title: Phantom of the Opera
programme.desc: An acid-scarred composer (Herbert Lom) has his dwarf helper bring an opera singer (Heather Sears) to his London sewer hide-out.","large":"Composer Lord Ambrose D'Arcy (Michael Gough) and his backer, Harry Hunter (Edward De Souza), struggle to find a replacement for the female lead in their new opera after she quits in the wake of a gruesome murder. When a new prospect, the nubile Christine Charles (Heather Sears), disappears, Harry cautiously investigates. Meanwhile, a mysterious masked man (Herbert Lom) who is eerily familiar with the opera holds Christine captive and offers to groom her to play the part.

programme.title: Revenge of the Creature
programme.desc: Florida aquarium workers (John Agar, Lori Nelson, John Bromfield) communicate by cattle prod with a captured gill-man.

programme.title: She-Wolf of London
programme.desc: Grisly murders convince a turn-of-the-century Londoner that she is the latest in a long line of werewolves.

programme.title: Son of Dracula
programme.desc: Count Alucard (Lon Chaney) makes Southern belle (Louise Allbritton) his bride.

programme.title: Son of Frankenstein
programme.desc: The baron's son (Basil Rathbone) revives his father's monster (Boris Karloff) with help from a broken-necked shepherd called Ygor (Bela Lugosi).","large":"Baron Wolf von Frankenstein is determined to prove the legitimacy of his father's scientific work, thus rescuing the family name from disgrace. With the help of Ygor, a grave robber, Wolf successfully reanimates the monster his father originally brought back from the dead. But when several villagers are killed mysteriously, Wolf must find the culprit in order to vindicate his creation, or face the possibility that he may be responsible.

programme.title: Sssssss
programme.desc: A snake scientist (Strother Martin) turns his daughter's (Heather Menzies) boyfriend (Dirk Benedict), his lab helper, into a big cobra.","large":"Short on cash, undergrad David Blake (Dirk Benedict) takes a job working as a lab assistant for snake expert Dr. Carl Stoner (Strother Martin). When Stoner begins giving David a series of antibiotics as a safeguard against snakebites, he at first thinks nothing of it. But gradually David begins to notice curious changes in his body, and his new girlfriend, Dr. Stoner's daughter, Kristina (Heather Menzies), notices them too. Could Dr. Stoner really be trying to turn his assistant into a snake?

programme.title: Tarantula
programme.desc: Desert scientists (John Agar, Mara Corday, Leo G. Carroll) try to stop a fortified spider the size of a building.

programme.title: The Thing
programme.desc: An alien that can duplicate other life forms invades a polar research station in this remake of the 1951 classic "The Thing from Another World."","large":"In remote Antarctica, a group of American research scientists are disturbed at their base camp by a helicopter shooting at a sled dog. When they take in the dog, it brutally attacks both human beings and canines in the camp, and they discover that the beast can assume the shape of its victims. A resourceful helicopter pilot and the camp doctor lead the camp crew in a desperate, gory battle against the vicious creature before it picks them all off, one by one.

programme.title: Tremors
programme.desc: Four big worms with multiple tongues dig high-speed around people (Kevin Bacon, Fred Ward, Finn Carter) in the middle of nowhere.","large":"Repairmen Val McKee (Kevin Bacon) and Earl Bassett (Fred Ward) are tired of their dull lives in the small desert town of Perfection, Nev. But just as the two try to skip town, they happen upon a series of mysterious deaths and a concerned seismologist (Finn Carter) studying unnatural readings below the ground. With the help of an eccentric couple (Reba McEntire, Michael Gross), the group fights for survival against giant, worm-like monsters hungry for human flesh.

programme.title: Tremors II: Aftershocks
programme.desc: The Mexican government hires two handymen (Fred Ward, Michael Gross) to battle huge man-eating worms plaguing an oil field.","large":"After spending all the reward money from his first encounter with the giant man-eating worms called Graboids, Earl Bassett (Fred Ward) agrees to hunt more of the deadly creatures at a Mexican oil refinery for $50,000 each. Knowing that he cannot face the monsters alone, Earl recruits Burt Gummer (Michael Gross), another veteran of the incident in Nevada, to supply the firepower. There is only one problem: The Graboids have now evolved to attack above ground.

programme.title: The Werewolf of London
programme.desc: An Asian werewolf (Warner Oland) bites a botanist (Henry Hull) in Tibet and rivals him for the antidote in London.","large":"While in Tibet researching a mysterious flower that purportedly takes its strength from the moon, botanist Wilfred Glendon is bitten by a strange creature. Back in London, Glendon becomes absorbed in his research of the plant, and is annoyed by the appearance of fellow scientist Dr. Yogami, who reveals that the plant is the only known temporary antidote for werewolves. Glendon remains skeptical until the next full moon, when he undergoes a startling transformation.

programme.title: The Wolf Man
programme.desc: Bitten by a werewolf, an aristocrat (Lon Chaney) grows fangs, fur and a muzzle, then begs his father (Claude Rains) for help.","large":"When his brother dies, Larry Talbot (Lon Chaney) returns to Wales and reconciles with his father (Claude Rains). While there, he visits an antique shop and, hoping to impress Gwen (Evelyn Ankers), the attractive shopkeeper, buys a silver walking cane. That same night he kills a wolf with it, only to later learn that he actually killed a man (Bela Lugosi). A gypsy (Maria Ouspenskaya) explains that it was her son, a werewolf, that he killed, and that Larry is now one himself.

programme.title: Altered
programme.desc: Fifteen years after they were abducted by aliens, four men get a chance to take revenge when they capture one of the creatures.","large":"Forever damaged by their stint as the scientific subjects of hostile alien creatures, a trio of alien-abduction survivors -- Otis (Michael C. Williams), Duke (Brad William Henke) and Cody (Paul McCarthy-Boyington) -- troll the wooded site of their disappearance, heavily armed, in search of their attackers. After wounding a violent alien in the woods, the three drag its dying body to the home of reclusive fellow abductee Wyatt (Adam Kaufman), barricade themselves in and prepare for the worst.

programme.title: Animal
programme.desc: When plans for a weekend vacation hit a dead end, friends find themselves stranded in unfamiliar territory, pursued by a bloodthirsty predator. Holed up in an isolated cabin, the friends must fight to survive as the body count rises.

programme.title: The Atticus Institute
programme.desc: In the early 1970s, Dr. Henry West creates an institute to find people with supernatural abilities. When Judith Winstead comes to the facility, she exhibits amazing abilities that the military wants to turn into a weapon.

programme.title: Beneath
programme.desc: Coal miners become trapped 600 feet below the surface. As the air grows toxic and time runs out, the crew descends into madness and turns on one another.

programme.title: The Birds II: Land's End
programme.desc: Killer birds infest a seaside town where parents (Brad Johnson, Chelsea Field) take their children for vacation.

programme.title: The Black Castle
programme.desc: An Englishman (Richard Greene) enters an Austrian nobleman's (Stephen McNally) castle, complete with torture chamber and alligator moat.

programme.title: Blood Creek
programme.desc: Two brothers become entangled in a sinister Nazi's occult experiment at an American farmhouse.

programme.title: Captive Wild Woman
programme.desc: A mad doctor (John Carradine) turns an animal trainer's (Milburn Stone) ape into Paula the ape-woman (Acquanetta).

programme.title: Cherry Falls
programme.desc: A serial killer stalking virgins in a small Virginia town targets an idealistic teenager (Brittany Murphy).","large":"A small-town sheriff, Brent Marken (Michael Biehn), discovers the presence of a serial killer in his sleepy hamlet. Since the perpetrator has been targeting only virgins, both male and female, the deaths cause panic in much of the local high school population. Sheriff Marken's daughter, Jody (Brittany Murphy), is among the potential victims, since she has yet to sleep with her boyfriend, Kenny Ascott (Gabriel Mann). Can the lawman stop the killer before he goes after Jody?

programme.title: Cry Wolf
programme.desc: Mysterious murders occur when students (Lindy Booth, Julian Morris) at a prep school invent a story about a serial killer.

programme.title: Cucuy: The Boogeyman
programme.desc: A teenage girl under house arrest discovers that the nightmarish urban legend of the Mexican boogeyman, El Cucuy, is true.

programme.title: The Darkness
programme.desc: A supernatural force terrorizes a couple (Kevin Bacon, Radha Mitchell) and their two children after the young son brings home some mysterious rocks from the Grand Canyon.","large":"Peter Taylor (Kevin Bacon), his wife Bronny and their two children return to Los Angeles after a fun-filled vacation to the Grand Canyon. Strange events soon start to plague the family, including young son Michael's increasingly erratic behavior. The Taylors learn that Michael brought back some mysterious rocks that he discovered inside a cave. Unfortunately, something followed them home as the clan now find themselves in a battle with a supernatural force that preys on their worst fears.

programme.title: Dead in the Water
programme.desc: An all-female crew, on a boat in the middle of nowhere, must deal with an invader on their ship.

programme.title: Dead Man's Eyes
programme.desc: Blinded by acid thanks to his jealous model, an artist (Lon Chaney) needs eye tissue for an operation.

programme.title: Delirium
programme.desc: A man inherits a haunted house after spending time in a mental institution.

programme.title: Dementia 13
programme.desc: A mysterious masked killer terrorizes members of a family at a secluded estate.

programme.title: The Forest
programme.desc: While investigating the disappearance of her twin sister, a young American encounters the tormented spirits of Japan's mysterious and legendary Aokigahara Forest.","large":"When her twin sister disappears in Japan, a young American named Sara becomes determined to find out what happened to her. Sara's investigation leads her to the legendary Aokigahara Forest, located at the base of Mount Fuji. Accompanied by expatriate Aiden, she enters the mysterious wilderness after being warned to "stay on the path." Her investigation plunges her into a dark world where the angry and tormented souls of the dead prey on those who dare to explore the forest.

programme.title: Games
programme.desc: A mysterious woman (Simone Signoret) in black moves in with married Manhattan thrill-seekers (James Caan, Katharine Ross) and helps one trick the other.","large":"Wealthy and bored, Paul (James Caan) and Jennifer Montgomery (Katharine Ross) while away their hours in a New York City apartment filled with pinball machines and other amusements. The couple's routine is upended when door-to-door saleswoman Lisa Schindler (Simone Signoret) drops by and is suddenly taken ill. The Montgomerys let her spend the night. And soon, the sophisticated Lisa and her hosts embark on a new set of very adult -- and very dangerous -- games.

programme.title: Gone
programme.desc: A televangelist (Gregory Itzin) influences a confrontational man (Billy Burke) motivated by revenge.

programme.title: The Green Inferno
programme.desc: Student activists (Lorenza Izzo, Ariel Levy) crash-land in the Amazon and encounter an indigenous tribe of cannibals who'd like to have them for dinner.","large":"New York college student Justine (Lorenza Izzo), a lawyer's daughter, meets a student activist named Alejandro (Ariel Levy) when he goes on a hunger strike on behalf of underpaid janitors. Smitten, Justine agrees to help Alejandro undertake his next project: to save the Amazon. She soon learns to regret her decision when their plane crashes in the Peruvian jungle and she and the rest of their group are taken captive by a tribe of hungry cannibals.

programme.title: The Guardian
programme.desc: Yuppies (Dwier Brown, Carey Lowell) with a baby hire a nanny (Jenny Seagrove), a druid witch who sacrifices babies to a tree.","large":"Optimistic about their future, well-off parents Kate (Carey Lowell) and Phil (Dwier Brown) hire the pleasant and lovely young Camilla (Jenny Seagrove) to live with them and care for their new baby. Though Camilla seems like an answer to their prayers, she proves to be more than she appears, and a diabolical plot involving the wellbeing of their child is uncovered. The young parents are forced to fight supernatural forces for the life of their vulnerable offspring.

programme.title: The Hitcher II: I've Been Waiting
programme.desc: A psychopathic hitchhiker (Jake Busey) terrorizes a man (C. Thomas Howell) and his girlfriend (Kari Wuhrer) as they take a road trip.","large":"Years after being traumatized by a hitchhiker, Jim Halsey (C. Thomas Howell) is trying to piece his life back together. After being suspended from the police force, he decides to return to Texas to speak with a friend about his problems. He reluctantly agrees to let his girlfriend, Maggie (Kari Wuhrer), join him. As they drive, Maggie lets a stranded driver (Jake Busey) into the car. Halsey becomes suspicious and kicks him out, but the stranger returns, undeterred, to wreak havoc.

programme.title: I Saw What You Did
programme.desc: Two teenage girls, bored while baby-sitting, make prank phone calls, completely unaware one of the people on the other end of the line has just killed his wife and now thinks the girls must be silenced.","large":"Kit (Sarah Lane) and her best friend, Libby (Andi Garrett), are two teenage girls bored while baby-sitting. To pass the time, they make prank phone calls, telling the person on the other end of the line, "I saw what you did, and I know who you are!" It's all in good fun, until they call a man (John Ireland) who just murdered his wife and buried her in the woods. Convinced they actually do know his secret, he becomes determined to find out who they are and silence them forever.

programme.title: Incarnate
programme.desc: Recruited by a Vatican emissary (Catalina Sandino Moreno), an exorcist (Aaron Eckhart) taps into the subconscious mind of a tormented boy (David Mazouz) to free him from demonic possession.","large":"After a single mother witnesses terrifying symptoms of demonic possession in her 11-year-old son (David Mazouz), a Vatican representative calls on wheelchair-bound scientist Dr. Seth Ember (Aaron Eckhart) to rid him of the evil spirit. Driven by a personal agenda rooted in his own tragic past, Ember enters the boy's unconscious mind where he confronts a demon as ferocious as it is ingenious.

programme.title: Karma
programme.desc: When recent college grad Manny has trouble making ends meet, his father-in-law offers him a job evicting delinquent tenants. Manny soon finds himself unleashing a karma demon which stalks him at every turn.

programme.title: The Keeping Hours
programme.desc: A lawyer sees the ghost of his dead son, which leads the man's estranged wife back into his life.

programme.title: Killer High
programme.desc: Sabrina's perfectly planned high school reunion goes south when a monster keeps killing all the guests.

programme.title: Boogeyman
programme.desc: Mike (Eddie McClintock), the town sheriff, has to battle the mythical Boogeyman after boys accidentally release it.

programme.title: Long Time Dead
programme.desc: A genie terrorizes London students (Lara Belmont, Melanie Gutteridge) after they unwittingly summon it with a Ouija.","large":"After a long night of dancing and drinking their way into a haze, roommates Rob (Joe Absolom), Liam (Alec Newman), Stella (Lara Belmont) and Spencer (James Hillier) and a few of their friends duck into a back room of the nightclub to play around with a Ouija board. None of the friends like what the board tells them: they will all die that night. Sure enough, one by one the young friends are slaughtered by a malevolent killer, amid revelations about satanic worship and sacrifice.

programme.title: Darkest Hour
programme.desc: Newly appointed British Prime Minister Winston Churchill must decide whether to negotiate with Hitler or fight against incredible odds. During the coming weeks, Churchill's courageous decisions and leadership help change the course of world history.","large":"The fate of Western Europe hangs on Winston Churchill in the early days of World War II. The newly appointed British prime minister must decide whether to negotiate with Hitler or fight on against incredible odds. During the next four weeks in 1940, Churchill cements his legacy as his courageous decisions and leadership help change the course of world history.

programme.title: First Man
programme.desc: Engineer Neil Armstrong spends years in training after joining NASA in the 1960s. On July 16, 1969, the nation and world watch in wonder as Armstrong and fellow astronauts Buzz Aldrin and Michael Collins embark on a historic mission to the moon.","large":"Hoping to reach the moon by the end of the decade, NASA plans a series of extremely dangerous, unprecedented missions in the early 1960s. Engineer Neil Armstrong joins the space program, spending years in training and risking his life during test flights. On July 16, 1969, the nation and world watch in wonder as Armstrong and fellow astronauts Buzz Aldrin and Michael Collins embark on the historic Apollo 11 spaceflight.

programme.title: Born on the Fourth of July
programme.desc: Based on the story of Ron Kovic, a Marine who returned from Vietnam a paraplegic and later became an anti-war activist.","large":"In the mid 1960s, suburban New York teenager Ron Kovic (Tom Cruise) enlists in the Marines, fulfilling what he sees as his patriotic duty. During his second tour in Vietnam, he accidentally kills a fellow soldier during a retreat and later becomes permanently paralyzed in battle. Returning home to an uncaring Veterans Administration bureaucracy and to people on both sides of the political divide who don't understand what he went through, Kovic becomes an impassioned critic of the war.

programme.title: Traffic
programme.desc: While a judge's (Michael Douglas) anti-drug campaign leads him to his own daughter, a DEA agent (Don Cheadle) targets a trafficker's wife, and a policeman (Benicio del Toro) fights corruption.","large":"A contemporary thriller set in the world of drug trafficking. Traffic evokes the high stakes and high risks of the drug trade, as seen through a series of interrelated stories, some of which are highly personal and some of which are filled with intrigue and danger.

programme.title: Alpha Dog
programme.desc: A teenage dealer (Emile Hirsch) and his friends kidnap the impressionable younger brother of a junkie who won't pay for the drugs.","large":"Teenage dealer Johnny Truelove (Emile Hirsch) and his friends kidnap the impressionable younger brother (Anton Yelchin) of a junkie (Ben Foster) who refuses to pay his drug debt. Things change unexpectedly when Frankie (Justin Timberlake), one of Johnny's pals, befriends the youth.

programme.title: BlacKkKlansman
programme.desc: Ron Stallworth, the first African-American police officer in Colorado Springs, Colo., works undercover to infiltrate the Ku Klux Klan in 1979. Stallworth and his partner Flip Zimmerman risk their lives to penetrate the KKK at its highest levels.","large":"Ron Stallworth is the first African-American detective to serve in the Colorado Springs Police Department. Determined to make a name for himself, Stallworth bravely sets out on a dangerous mission: infiltrate and expose the Ku Klux Klan. The detective soon recruits a more seasoned colleague, Flip Zimmerman, into the undercover investigation of a lifetime. Together, they team up to take down the extremist hate group as the organization aims to sanitize its rhetoric to appeal to the mainstream.

programme.title: Straight Outta Compton
programme.desc: In 1988, N.W.A (O'Shea Jackson Jr., Corey Hawkins, Jason Mitchell) revolutionizes music and pop culture with their brutally honest depiction of life in Southern Los Angeles.","large":"In 1988, a groundbreaking new group revolutionizes music and pop culture, changing and influencing hip-hop forever. N.W.A's first studio album, "Straight Outta Compton," stirs controversy with its brutally honest depiction of life in Southern Los Angeles. With guidance from veteran manager Jerry Heller, band members Ice Cube (O'Shea Jackson Jr.), Dr. Dre (Corey Hawkins), Eazy-E, DJ Yella and MC Ren navigate their way through the industry, acquiring fame, fortune and a place in history.

programme.title: 2 Guns
programme.desc: In the dark about each other's true identity, two undercover agents (Denzel Washington, Mark Wahlberg) from competing bureaus go on the run together after an attempt to infiltrate a drug cartel goes haywire.","large":"For the past year, DEA agent Bobby Trench and U.S. Navy intelligence officer Marcus Stigman have been working undercover as members of a narcotics syndicate. The twist: Neither man knows that the other is an undercover agent. When their attempt to infiltrate a Mexican drug cartel and recover millions goes haywire, the men are disavowed by their superiors. Trench and Stigman must go on the run lest they wind up in jail or in a grave.

programme.title: The Adjustment Bureau
programme.desc: After glimpsing his future, an ambitious politician (Matt Damon) battles the agents of Fate itself to be with the woman (Emily Blunt) he loves.","large":"Just as he is on the brink of winning a Senate seat, politician David Norris meets a ballerina named Elise Sellas. Though David is instantly smitten, mysterious men conspire to keep him away from the beautiful dancer. David learns that he is facing the powerful agents of Fate itself, and glimpsing the future laid out for him, must either accept a predetermined path that does not include Elise or else defy Fate to be with her.

programme.title: Fast & Furious 6
programme.desc: Hobbs has Dominic and Brian reassemble their crew to take down a team of mercenaries: Dominic unexpectedly gets convoluted also facing his presumed deceased girlfriend, Letty.","large":"Since Dom (Vin Diesel) and Brian's (Paul Walker) heist in Rio left them and their crew very rich people, they've scattered across the globe; however, they must still live as fugitives, unable to return home to their families. Meanwhile, Agent Hobbs (Dwayne Johnson) has been tracking a gang of lethally skilled mercenary drivers whose second-in-command is someone Dom knows. Unable to take them down himself, Hobbs asks Dom and his crew for help in exchange for full pardons for everyone.

programme.title: Furious 7
programme.desc: A smooth-talking government agent offers to help Dominic Toretto and his gang eliminate a dangerous enemy in exchange for their help in rescuing a kidnapped computer hacker.","large":"After defeating international terrorist Owen Shaw, Dominic Toretto (Vin Diesel), Brian O'Conner (Paul Walker) and the rest of the crew have separated to return to more normal lives. However, Deckard Shaw , Owen's older brother, is thirsty for revenge. A slick government agent offers to help Dom and company take care of Shaw in exchange for their help in rescuing a kidnapped computer hacker who has developed a powerful surveillance program.

programme.title: Death Race
programme.desc: Imprisoned for a murder he did not commit, a three-time speedway champion (Jason Statham) must compete in a brutal auto race in which the penalty for losing is death.","large":"Framed for a murder he did not commit, three-time speedway champ Jensen Ames (Jason Statham) finds himself at Terminal Island, the country's toughest prison, but he gets an unexpected chance at freedom when the warden offers a choice: Compete in the Death Race as a mythical driver called Frankenstein, or rot in a cell forever. Riding in a car equipped with flamethrowers and grenade launchers, Ames must survive a gauntlet of vicious criminals to win his freedom -- or die trying.

programme.title: Death Race 2
programme.desc: Convicted of killing a cop, an inmate (Luke Goss) competes in a brutal race where cars are deadly weapons.

programme.title: Death Race 3: Inferno
programme.desc: Only one victory away from winning his freedom, legendary driver Carl Lucas (Luke Goss) enters the first Death Race to take place in the brutal Kalahari Desert.

programme.title: Death Race: Beyond Anarchy
programme.desc: Black ops specialist Connor Gibson infiltrates a maximum security prison to take down legendary driver Frankenstein in a violent and brutal car race.

programme.title: Jarhead 2: Field of Fire
programme.desc: Without tanks or air support, a corporal and his team must muster all the courage and firepower they can to fight their way across war-torn Afghanistan and shepherd an important anti-Taliban woman to safety.

programme.title: Jarhead 3: The Siege
programme.desc: Marines protecting a U.S. embassy are caught off guard when militants suddenly attack. Outnumbered and outgunned, the Marines have to muster enough courage and firepower to survive the assault.

programme.title: Lone Survivor
programme.desc: In the mountains of Afghanistan, a squad of Taliban fighters ambushes four Navy SEALs, who are there on a mission to eliminate a high-ranking al-Qaeda operative.","large":"In 2005 Afghanistan, Navy SEALs Marcus Luttrell (Mark Wahlberg), Michael Murphy (Taylor Kitsch), Danny Dietz (Emile Hirsch) and Matthew "Axe" Axelson (Ben Foster) deploy on a mission of surveillance and to take out Taliban leader Ahmad Shah. Though spotted by goatherds, Luttrell and his team decide not to kill them. But one of the Afghans alerts a group of Taliban fighters to the invaders, and a terrible battle ensues, in which the SEALs find themselves hopelessly outnumbered and outgunned.

programme.title: Aa Ab Laut Chalen
programme.desc: An ambitious youth who goes to the US to try his luck is caught in a love triangle with a luckless friend and a spoilt, rich kid.

programme.title: Pardes
programme.desc: Kishorilal arranges his westernized son's marriage to Ganga, brought from India to the USA, where Ganga forms a deeper connection with Kishorilal's foster son, Arjun.

programme.title: Janta Ki Adalat
programme.desc: DSP Jyoti arrests Shankar after he threatens a minister. She learns about the minister's crimes and decides to thwart his plans of becoming a CM.

programme.title: Indian
programme.desc: DCP Raj Shekhar Azad nabs terrorist Wasim Khan, but uncovers deep police corruption involving his father-in-law. Framed for murder, he must clear his name and fight for justice.

programme.title: Allah Rakha
programme.desc: Street urchin Allah Rakha discovers that his parents are alive and that the family was separated by a mafia don. He sets out for revenge.

programme.title: Aag Se Khelenge
programme.desc: Shekhar teams up with Johnny to fight Zaka's empire. But when he discovers Ravi Saxena died months ago, everything he believed about his ally - and their mission - starts to unravel.

programme.title: Roop Ki Rani Choron Ka Raja
programme.desc: Orphaned after a criminal murders their parents, two children grow up facing hardships and eventually seek revenge against their parents' killer.

programme.title: Koi Mil Gaya
programme.desc: Starring: Hrithik Roshan,Priety Zinta. Rohit, a specially-abled boy, befriends an alien. Police pursue the extraterrestrial, testing Rohit's resolve to protect his newfound friend.

programme.title: Hum Aapke Hain Koun
programme.desc: Starring: Madhuri Dixit,Salman Khan. Prem madly loves Nisha, his brother Rajesh's sister-in-law. But when Rajesh's wife dies, the families urge him to marry Nisha for the sake of his baby. Prem and Nisha decide to sacrifice their love.

programme.title: Singham Again
programme.desc: Starring: Ajay Devgn,Kareena Kapoor Khan. Drawing parallels to the Ramayana, Bajirao Singham leads his team on a perilous mission to rescue his wife, confronting betrayal and a mysterious antagonist who tests his courage and resolve.

programme.title: Bajrangi Bhaijaan
programme.desc: Starring: Salman Khan,Kareena Kapoor. Pawan, a Hanuman devotee, finds a speech-impaired Pakistani girl lost in Haryana and undertakes a dangerous journey across borders to reunite her with her family with love.

programme.title: Antony
programme.desc: Starring: Joju George,Chemban Vinod Jose. Antony, once feared as a ruthless gangster, unexpectedly becomes the guardian of Ann Maria. Their bond grows, but a dangerous enemy from his past resurfaces with deadly intent.

programme.title: Mardini
programme.desc: Starring: Ritanya Huvanna,Akshay Gowda. In Chikmagalur, a courageous policewoman takes on corrupt leaders during a high-stakes mission. Her strength and resolve ignite a battle for justice in a town gripped by fear.

programme.title: Jersey
programme.desc: Starring: Nani,Shraddha Srinath. Arjun, a talented but failed cricketer, decides to return to cricket in his late thirties, driven by the desire to represent the Indian cricket team and fulfil his son's wish for a jersey as a gift.

programme.title: Pakka Commercial
programme.desc: Starring: Gopichand,Raashii Khanna. In a legal rollercoaster, Judge Suryanarayana quits after failing to serve justice. His wily son, Lucky, takes center stage, exposing a criminal's hidden sins.

programme.title: Raid 2
programme.desc: Starring: Ajay Devgn,Riteish Deshmukh. In Bhoj, Amay Patnaik uncovers a corrupt empire led by Dada Bhai. His pursuit of justice challenges the grip of power and the silence it demands.

programme.title: De De Pyaar De 2
programme.desc: Starring: Ajay Devgn,R. Madhavan. London-based NRI investor Ashish Mehra visits his girlfriend's family to seek approval for their relationship. Trouble begins when her father discovers Ashish's actual age.

programme.title: Crew
programme.desc: Starring: Tabu,Kareena Kapoor. Three flight attendants resort to gold smuggling to save their careers after their airline faces bankruptcy, leading to risky choices and life-threatening consequences.

programme.title: Sky Force
programme.desc: Starring: Akshay Kumar,Veer Pahariya. Amid escalating airstrikes between India and Pakistan, a group strives to uncover the truth behind the conflict, risking their lives to stop deadly consequences.

programme.title: Gadar 2
programme.desc: Starring: Sunny Deol,Ameesha Patel. When Tara Singh goes missing during a skirmish and is believed to be captured in Pakistan, his son Jeete sets out to rescue him and enters a labyrinth from which they both must escape at all costs.

programme.title: Uri: The Surgical Strike
programme.desc: Starring: Vicky Kaushal,Yami Gautam. After militants attack a base in Uri, Major Vihaan Singh Shergill executes a covert strike across the border to eliminate the perpetrators with tactical precision.

programme.title: Kaliveera
programme.desc: Starring: Chirashree Anchan,Ekalavyaa. Kaliveera follows the journey of a tribal man, Kali determines to fight against the highly influential criminals involved in an international crime.

programme.title: Yaman
programme.desc: Starring: Vijay Antony,Miya. To avenge his father's death, a young man infiltrates corrupt politics. As he rises, lines blur between justice and ambition in a gripping tale of betrayal and power.

programme.title: Attack
programme.desc: Starring: Manchu Manoj,Jagapati Babu. Guru Raj, a powerful businessman, is killed and one of his three sons, Kaali, vows to find the culprit. When he is also killed, Radha, Kaali's brother, vows to uncover the killer and exact revenge.

programme.title: Ajay
programme.desc: Starring: Sunny Deol,Karisma Kapoor. Ajay, a decent man from a middle class family finds his whole family murdered. He decides to work for Rupesh, a criminal. While working with him, Ajay finds a clue leading to the killer.

programme.title: Tuk Tuk
programme.desc: Starring: Harsh Roshan,Karthikeya Dev. While raising money for a camera, three boys create a makeshift auto rickshaw for festival donations. Trouble begins when it suddenly gains a mind of its own.

programme.title: Vivah Journey From Engagment To Marriage
programme.desc: Vivah Journey From Engagment To Marriage

programme.title: I
programme.desc: Starring: Vikram,Amy Jackson. Lingesan, a thriving model, finds love with Diya, but his life unravels when he's plagued by physical deformities, testing their love.

programme.title: The Kerala Story 2
programme.desc: The Kerala Story 2

programme.title: Celebrity
programme.desc: Celebrity

programme.title: Gunjan Saxena: The Kargil Girl
programme.desc: Starring: Janhvi Kapoor,Pankaj Tripathi. Gunjan Saxena, inspired by the allure of cockpit life, overcomes hurdles to fulfill her dream of becoming a pilot, bravely serving her country in the Kargil War.

programme.title: Bhajarangi 2
programme.desc: Starring: Shiva Rajkumar,Shruthi Raj. A forest officer uncovers drug baron Araka's scheme: exploiting villagers for drug production. Driven, the officer resolves to halt the operation.

programme.title: Chandu Champion
programme.desc: Starring: Kartik Aaryan,Vijay Raaz. Chandu Champion faced every obstacle with grit and fire. From tough times to triumph, his unbreakable spirit led him to India's first individual Olympic gold. One man. One dream. One victory.

Starring: Rajinikanth,Akshay Kumar. In Chennai, mobiles begin flying out of people's hands. Dr. Vaseegaran reactivates his robot, Chitti, to battle the bird-like supernatural force of Pakshirajan, who controls the skies.

programme.title: Dharam Karam
programme.desc: A criminal wants his son to grow up and become a decent man. The boy grows up in the care of a wrestler and a mid-wife.

programme.title: Kahani Kismat Ki
programme.desc: Ajay's fate changes through ambition, relationships and unexpected events that challenge loyalty, destiny and personal choices.

programme.title: Aadmi Aur Insaan
programme.desc: Jai and Munish fall for Meena, straining their friendship. Trouble worsens when Munish learns Jai is tied to a tragedy involving a collapsed railway bridge project.

programme.title: Farz
programme.desc: Inspector Ravi risks his life to uphold justice, confronting dangerous criminals while balancing loyalty, duty and sacrifice.

programme.title: Inteqam
programme.desc: A tragic chain of events leads to revenge, mistaken identities, and unexpected friendships in a tale of heartbreak and resilience.

programme.title: Chandan Ka Palna
programme.desc: Ajit suit acknowledges that his life after marriage is complete. He and his mother's bizarre behavior soon starts,which tend to disturb their relations.

programme.title: Mere Bhaiya
programme.desc: A girl tries to reconcile her father and her brother, because she loves both very much. She tries to reform her brother by making sacrifices, which shakes his core.

programme.title: Devasur Sangram
programme.desc: 'Devasur Sangram' highlights personal growth amid conflict, urging readers to resolve internal battles for peace, depicting the cycle of war and self-conquest.

programme.title: Dil Ne Phir Yaad Kiya
programme.desc: Ashok plans to marry Ashoo, but when he goes to get her from her village, he finds out that she has been abducted. He has to find her and return back to the city before his close friend's wedding.

programme.title: Kranti
programme.desc: Two men join the fight for India's independence in the epic saga 'Kranti.' Sangha's loyalty is tested as he leads a revolution against the British rule to achieve freedom for India.

programme.title: Apna Desh
programme.desc: When Akash attempts to expose his employer's corrupt ways, his brother is framed and arrested, and Akash must try to clear his sibling's name.

programme.title: Shalimar
programme.desc: A small thief aspires to become a don after stealing the priceless diamond, Shalimar.

programme.title: Hiraasat
programme.desc: Rajesh faces wrongful accusations and betrayal, fighting powerful enemies to protect his family and reclaim his honour.

programme.title: Shehzada
programme.desc: Bantu, despised by his father Valmiki, discovers his true parents, the Jindals, and strives to win their affection while protecting them from threats.

programme.title: Abhinetri
programme.desc: Shekhar, a young scientist, falls in love with Anjana, a dancer, and marries her. Differences separate the couple but when Shekhar's mother visits, they are forced to unite again.

programme.title: Love In Tokyo
programme.desc: An orphaned boy meets a runaway girl in Tokyo, both seeking to escape their respective predicaments. Their bond grows, but their pasts threaten to tear them apart in a tale of escape.

programme.title: Lav Kush
programme.desc: Ram made a choice, and Sitaji had to leave. Their sons then started a difficult journey. The family faced hard times and a lot of problems.

programme.title: Padosan
programme.desc: Bhola Falls In Love With His Neighbour Bindu, A Fashionable College Girl. In Order To Woo Her, He Seeks Help From A Friend. But Bhola Loses All Hope When Bindu Claims To Love Someone Else.

programme.title: Kala Dhanda Goray Log
programme.desc: Gauri Shankar loses his children and his freedom when Durga Das, a drug lord, frames him for murder. Years later, he emerges as Michael and joins another group to take revenge against him.

programme.title: Haisiyat
programme.desc: Union leader Ram is also married to his boss. When there is a conflict between the management and the workers, Ram must decide if his duty lies towards his wife or towards his union and the workers.

programme.title: Kohraam
programme.desc: Kohraam is an intense action thriller that explores the life of a man who uncovers a dangerous conspiracy. As he faces threats and challenges, he must fight to expose the truth and save lives.

programme.title: Shagird
programme.desc: Professor Brij, who is sworn to bachelorhood, mentors Ramesh, who wants to be just like him. However, when the professor falls for Poonam, he faces a dilemma.

programme.title: Khushboo
programme.desc: Kusum and Brindavan love each other, and decide to marry when they grow up. But fate has other plans, both are separated. Years later they meet again.

programme.title: Kirayadar
programme.desc: Laxmi Abhyankar and her employed daughter Jaya live on rent in a flat on Pali Hill, Mumbai they rented years ago from Lucknow-based Kundanlal Choudhury. His son Anil comes to Mumbai and gets a job.

programme.title: Anjaana
programme.desc: Raju, Garage mechanic falls in love with a rich girl but her guardian opposes the marriage. Then Raju decides to con him to teach him a lesson.

programme.title: Raju Ban Gaya Gentleman
programme.desc: As a newly graduated engineer loses track of what's important, his career starts to rise. When he falls in love with a beautiful young woman, he gets even more confused about what he wants.

programme.title: Seeta Aur Geeta
programme.desc: Seeta (Hema Malini) is an unhappy heiress who is mistreated by her aunt, Kaushalya (Manorama), who holds the purse strings in the household even though her wealth comes from Seeta's late parents. Despondent, Seeta runs off to end her life, but is rescued and mistaken for her lost twin sister, Geeta (also Malini), who grew up poor and became a tough-minded street performer. The two switch places, surprising those around them by their drastically changed temperaments.

programme.title: Filhaal
programme.desc: When Sia watches her best friend Rewa slip into depression because of her inability to bear a child, she offers to be her surrogate. Trouble brews when jealousy finds its way into their relationship.

programme.title: Zakhmi Insan (dub) (dass Tamil)
programme.desc: Antony falls in love with Rajeswari who belongs to an upper caste family. When her father kills her sister for marrying a man from the lower caste, she decides to elope with Antony.
